name: Poker
rules: No-limit Texas hold'em, house blinds, freezeout unless noted.
scoring: Chip finish order converted to points.

name: Hearts
rules: Standard Hearts with moon shooting enabled.
scoring: Highest score wins under house variant table.

name: Blackjack
rules: Dealer rotates every shoe, standard hit/stand/double/split.

name: Canadian Salad
rules: Progressive trick-taking rounds with rotating constraints.
scoring: Round points cumulative with bonus hand option.

name: Oh Heck
rules: Bid exact tricks each round, no bid duplication by dealer.
scoring: 10 + bid for exact, trick count otherwise.

name: Darts
scoring: First to finish gets full points, descending thereafter.

name: The Game
rules: Running mind game; mention triggers penalty.
